name: Sight for the Man Born Blind
oracleText: Scry 2, then draw a card. Untap target creature. It gains vigilance until end of turn.
flavorText: "I went and washed, and I received sight." — John 9:11
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses El Greco's "Christ Healing the Blind" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Commons tags the MET painting as public-domain.
classics.creditText: El Greco, Christ Healing the Blind
classics.sourceNotes: Strong, iconically tense treatment for the blind-healing scene.
